heading: General Provisions
label: F General Provisions
notes: CodificationThe letter designation for this Part F was, in the original, Part G. The original Part F of title II of , consisting of section 601 thereof, is set out as a note under . The original Part G of title II of consisted of sections 701 to 709. Sections 701 to 705 amended and repealed sections in this title and in Title 18, Crimes and Criminal Procedure, and Title 42, The Public Health and Welfare, and enacted provisions set out as notes under sections 321, 801, and 822 of this title. See Tables for classifications of said sections 701 to 705. Sections 706 to 709 of are set out as sections 901 to 904 of this title and, for purposes of codification, comprise this Part F.Pub. L. 91–513section 801 of this titlePub. L. 91–513Pub. L. 91–513
